channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Despite Alex Ovechkin scoring his 877th goal, the Capitals lose to the Jets 5-4 in overtime
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Alex Ovechkin scored the 877th goal of his career to move 18 away from breaking the NHL record, but the Washington Capitals lost 5-4 in overtime to the Winnipeg Jets on Saturday night in a showdown of the top two teams in the NHL that lived up to that billing.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Straka has late surge to regain Pebble Beach lead over Rory McIlroy and Shane Lowry
item.description: PEBBLE BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Rory McIlroy felt like he was playing in the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am he used to watch on TV, minus the amateur and celebrities filling up the time on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sharks trade analysis: Erik Karlsson trade to Pittsburgh bears more fruit for San Jose
item.description: Trade with Dallas Stars could give San Jose Sharks three picks inside the top 34 in this year's NHL Draft
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Arizona State coach Bobby Hurley waves players off court after testy finish against rival Arizona
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Tommy Lloyd and Bobby Hurley met near midcourt during pregame, exchanging pleasantries, patting each other on the back. An afternoon of chirping and a late headbutt sent the coaches in opposite directions by the time the rivalry game was over.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Victor Wembanyama sits out Spurs' game against Heat because of an undisclosed illness
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Victor Wembanyama sat out the San Antonio Spurs' game Saturday night against the Miami Heat because of an undisclosed illness. Selected to his first All-Star Game as a Western Conference reserve Thursday, Wembanyama was ruled out 40 minutes prior to game time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz end 8-game skid with 113-99 win over Magic
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The losing streak is finally over. Collin Sexton scored 22 points and John Collins added 19 to help the Utah Jazz snap an eight-game losing streak with a 113-99 victory over the Orlando Magic on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Pascal Siakam hits late 3-pointer as the Pacers hang on to beat the Hawks, 132-127
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Pascal Siakam made a key 3-pointer late in the fourth quarter and finished with 20 points, nine rebounds and five assists to help the Indiana Pacers beat the reeling Atlanta Hawks 132-127 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Claude, Yates III lead USC to 70-64 upset of No. 7 Michigan State and snap Spartans' 13-game streak
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Desmond Claude scored 19, Wesley Yates III had 15 and Southern California upset No. 7 Michigan State 70-64 on Saturday afternoon, snapping the Spartans 13-game winning streak. Chibuzo Agbo added 14 points for the Trojans (13-8, 5-5 Big Ten), who led the entire game.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A Lim Kim maintains 3-shot lead in LPGA Tour's season-opening event at Lake Nona
item.description: A Lim Kim maintained a three-shot lead over Linn Grant on Saturday in the LPGA Tour’s season-opening Hilton Grand Vacations Tournament of Champions, with each shooting 5-under 67 in the final group at Lake Nona.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Welcome to the Madhouse: NASCAR hits tiny Bowman Gray Stadium for rough-and-tumble racing
item.description: WINSTON-SALEM, N.C. (AP) — Ryan Blaney was a little kid the first time he raced at Bowman Gray Stadium — he figures he couldn't have been older than 10 — and remembers it being the coolest thing he'd ever done in motorsports.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Families sue California AG over trans athlete law after girl loses varsity spot to transgender competitor
item.description: Families of two teenage girls are suing California Attorney General Rob Bonta over the state's laws that allow transgender athletes to compete in girls sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arizona State’s Bobby Hurley sends team to locker room early after opponent’s ‘no class’ behavior, ejections
item.description: Tensions ran high between Arizona State and Arizona during a game Saturday, resulting in ejections and no handshake line after the game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bill Belichick wins over UNC fraternities with free pizza ahead of Duke basketball game
item.description: North Carolina head football coach Bill Belichick is delivering pizza to UNC fraternities before the Tar Heels' game against Duke Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz trade Mills and Eubanks for Bamba and Tucker
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Five days before the NBA trade deadline, the Utah Jazz have made a deal with the Los Angeles Clippers. The Jazz have acquired center Mo Bamba, forward P.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tennis great Pam Shriver reunited with stolen trophies taken while evacuating Los Angeles wildfires
item.description: Pam Shriver has been reunited with several of her trophies after her car, which contained those items, was stolen after she had evacuated her home because of the L.A. wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shi’s unstoppable: American sophomore is a scoring machine
item.description: Shirina Shi averages 25 points per game for American-Fremont: ‘She’s a great all-around player who will get even better’
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Chicago visits Detroit following Cunningham's 40-point game
item.description: Chicago Bulls (21-28, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Detroit Pistons (24-24, sixth in the Eastern Conference) Detroit; Sunday, 3 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Detroit hosts the Chicago Bulls after Cade Cunningham scored 40 points in the Detroit Pistons' 117-102 victory over the Dallas Mavericks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Northern California horse racing faces grim future
item.description: The California Authority of Racing Fairs this week announced that it would abandon plans to organize horse racing meets this year throughout several county fairs in the upper half of the state.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Martin, The Mercury News

item.title: Ex-NFL player Kyle Rudolph discusses Vikings' QB decision, referees, the Super Bowl and NFL Draft giveaways
item.description: Former Pro Bowl tight end Kyle Rudolph sat down with Fox News Digital to discuss the Vikings' quarterback decision, NFL refs and his charity's upcoming giveaways.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boys Basketball: El Camino 60, La Costa Canyon 55
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys basketball on Wednesday night in the North County with El Camino hosting La Costa Canyon. Wildcats edged out the Mavericks 60-55 in a very good game.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Teen girls open up on trans athlete scandal that turned their high school into a culture war battleground
item.description: Girls at Martin Luther King High School in California held a live press conference to discuss an ongoing national controversy involving a trans athlete.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bill Walton to be honored at San Diego Gulls game with bobblehead giveaway, specialty jerseys
item.description: The San Diego Gulls will honor NBA legend Bill Walton at their game against the Toronto Marlies on Friday night, with the first 8,000 fans receiving a Bill Walton bobblehead.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ha-Seong Kim agrees to 2-year deal worth $29 million with Rays, AP source says
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays and free agent Ha-Seong Kim have agreed to a two-year contract valued at $29 million, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dwyane Wade reveals cancer diagnosis, kidney surgery
item.description: The Chicago native shared the story of the "shocking" diagnosis and the emotional toll it took on him on the latest episode of his 'The Why' podcast.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: Crosby's overtime goal beats Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Sidney Crosby scored with 1:06 left in overtime as the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Wednesday. It was Crosby's 95th career game-winning goal, moving him past Steve Yzerman for the 13th most in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: San Marcos 82, Poway 48
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Basketball at Poway on Tuesday evening with the Titans hosting San Marcos. The Titans were down 22-18 at the end of the 1st, but down 13 at the break and San Marcos kept the pedal to the metal and pulled off in the 2nd half and won 82-48.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Scottie Scheffler details his hand injury from making ravioli and is ready to get back to golf
item.description: PEBBLE BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Scottie Scheffler felt frustrated sitting at home for two tournaments he normally plays while recovering from glass puncturing the palm of his right hand while making ravioli. A big part of him was thankful the injury wasn't worse.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, ending her 11-year run with Phoenix
item.description: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, marking the end of her 11-year career with the Phoenix Mercury.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UVU hoping to make first NCAA Tournament
item.description: OREM, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Duke, Michigan State, Auburn, Houston andUtah Valley? All of those college basketball teams own double-digit winning streaks right now, with the Wolverines having just won their tenth in a row.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Florida coach Todd Golden cleared in Title IX investigation regarding stalking allegations
item.description: The University of Florida has cleared men's basketball coach Todd Golden following a four-month Title IX investigation into allegations of sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and stalking.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NASCAR Chicago Street Race tickets go on sale Monday
item.description: CHICAGO — Tickets for the NASCAR Chicago Street Race go on sale to the public Monday. The third edition of Chicago Street Race Weekend will be back downtown from July 5-6, capping off the Fourth of July holiday.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl LIX matchup set
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The stage is set for Super Bowl 59, with two heavyweights ready to clash: the Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles. The game will feature marquee stars Patrick Mahomes, Jalen Hurts, Travis Kelce, and Saquon Barkley.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Kieron van Wyk, 23, first amateur to win APGA Tour event at Farmers Invitational
item.description: Kieron van Wyk, a 23-year-old South African amateur golfer, made history as the first amateur to win an APGA Tour event at the Farmers Insurance Invitational in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ryan Pressly waives no-trade clause to join the Chicago Cubs, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a trade for Ryan Pressly, adding the right-hander to the back end of their bullpen in their second major offseason deal with the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, Fox 5
